amendments.text: [(a) Movable surfaces must be installed so that there is no interference between any surfaces, their bracing, or adjacent fixed structure, when one surface is held in its most critical clearance positions and the others are operated through their full movement.] (b) If an adjustable stabilizer is used, it must have stops that will limit its range of travel to that allowing safe flight and landing. 90-18; Issued on 06/15/90. --> Link to eCFR --> NPRM ACTIONS:   Notice of Proposed Rulemaking. Notice No. 90-18; Issued on 06/15/90. 26269; Issued on 07/28/93. --> Link to eCFR --> FINAL RULE ACTIONS:   Final Rule. Docket No. 26269; Issued on 07/28/93.
